offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, cash flow gaps cause missed discounts. We provide a cash flow forecasting system instead of manual tracking with spreadsheets.
problem: Cash flow gaps due to fluctuating sales and expenses.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on cash flow
DM 20-50 Etsy sellers with demo video
Share insights in Etsy seller forums
try_it: Let users try cash flow tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the tool
Offer early-access onboarding for first users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save frequent inputs as reusable templates
Enable CSV import for existing sales data
